title: Professor Bidya Banerjee
subTitle: Bidya works as an anatomy professor and a nighttime vigilante. She applies classroom knowledge to deliver justice, one bone at a time.

title: Rangamati Tirandaj
subTitle: Rangamati has exceptional archery skills, despite using her primitive bow. While she strives to make ends meet, a rich lady gifts her a professional bow to fuel her passions.

title: Parashuram
subTitle: Parashuram, a mild mannered family man leads a double life as an undercover agent, without the knowledge of his wife and children.

title: Desher Mati
subTitle: Dodo reminds Bikram that Kyan is an adult who must take responsibility. In Swarupnagar, Abin provides comfort as Noah breaks down.

title: Kusum Dola
subTitle: Ranajay and Iman get married under circumstances beyond their control. Although they eventually fall in love, the pair continues to struggle with persistent marital strife.

title: Tumi Chherona Haat Pothe
subTitle: Cousins Moni and Rashi marry into the wealthy Modak family, seemingly living a dream. However, Moni soon finds herself battling conspiracies from unexpected quarters.

title: Milon Hobe Kotodine
subTitle: By intercepting a thief and retrieving Lalita's stolen jewellery, Suneha regains the family's trust. She successfully moves back into the house to advance her hidden agenda.

title: Rangamati Tirandaj
subTitle: Rangamati has exceptional archery skills, despite using her primitive bow. While she strives to make ends meet, a rich lady gifts her a professional bow to fuel her passions.

title: Professor Bidya Banerjee
subTitle: Bidya works as an anatomy professor and a nighttime vigilante. She applies classroom knowledge to deliver justice, one bone at a time.

title: O Mor Dorodiya
subTitle: Bani blames Aniruddha for her ruined life after a birth swap. She seeks justice while hidden truths threaten to shatter their fragile bond.

title: Gangaa
subTitle: Living in a community with ultraconservative people presents many challenges for Ganga, a child widow. But, despite her difficulties, she bravely and endearingly challenges outdated traditions.

title: Compass
subTitle: Compass, a fearless girl in college, helps friends tackle personal and academic dilemmas while discovering unexpected twists when a new student joins.

title: Parashuram
subTitle: Parashuram, a mild mannered family man leads a double life as an undercover agent, without the knowledge of his wife and children.

title: Bholebaba Paar Karega
subTitle: Ujaan urges Kushanjan to depart from Queen's residence promptly. Subsequently, he queries Queen about Ratnojit, having gained knowledge of him from Keya.

title: Rangamati Tirandaj
subTitle: Rangamati has exceptional archery skills, despite using her primitive bow. While she strives to make ends meet, a rich lady gifts her a professional bow to fuel her passions.

title: Milon Hobe Kotodine
subTitle: By intercepting a thief and retrieving Lalita's stolen jewellery, Suneha regains the family's trust. She successfully moves back into the house to advance her hidden agenda.

title: Chiroshokha
subTitle: Following her husband's death, Kamalini, a devoted mother, assumes all family responsibilities. In this challenging journey, she finds support solely from Swatantra, her late husband's closest friend.

subTitle: Parashuram, a mild mannered family man leads a double life as an undercover agent, without the knowledge of his wife and children.

title: Desher Mati
subTitle: Noah, a virtuous woman, looks after the elderly and solitary Mukherjee couple. Her presence might help the rest of their family reconnect with their heritage when they arrive.

title: Kusum Dola
subTitle: Ranajay and Iman get married under circumstances beyond their control. Although they eventually fall in love, the pair continues to struggle with persistent marital strife.

title: Bholebaba Paar Karega
subTitle: Jill, a young woman from a middle-class family, aspires to become a rapper and the voice of the marginalised. However, the domestic conditions at her home hold her back.

title: Compass
subTitle: Compass, a fearless girl in college, helps friends tackle personal and academic dilemmas while discovering unexpected twists when a new student joins.

title: Lokkhi Jhnapi
subTitle: A determined young woman strives to restore her family's honour by establishing a bank while navigating complex relationships and societal challenges.

title: O Mor Dorodiya
subTitle: Bani blames Aniruddha for her ruined life after a birth swap. She seeks justice while hidden truths threaten to shatter their fragile bond.

title: Professor Bidya Banerjee
subTitle: Bidya works as an anatomy professor and a nighttime vigilante. She applies classroom knowledge to deliver justice, one bone at a time.

title: Gangaa
subTitle: Ammaji and the family suspect Ganga of pilfering a gold chain from their home. However, when Ganga returns unaware, Ammaji's search of her yields no evidence of the missing jewellery.

title: Milon Hobe Kotodine
subTitle: Elaa's birthday surprises for Gora are targeted by Suneha. Despite the malicious efforts, Gora warmly embraces every heartfelt surprise.

title: Chiroshokha
subTitle: Jagyaseni confides in Kamalini about her fixation on Swatantra. Conversely, Swatantra acknowledges that he appreciates every moment he shares with Kamalini.

title: Sudhu Tomari Jonyo
subTitle: Rahi plans to stay in India while Titli dreams of America. Rahul desires Titli, but Rahi has feelings for Rahul, creating a complex love triangle.
